text: The recommendation engine has 50 input features, branching through 20 transformation stages to 3 final scores: Relevance, Diversity, Freshness.

source.prompt: The recommendation engine has 50 input features, branching through 20 transformation stages to 3 final scores: Relevance, Diversity, Freshness.

args.code: function spaceColonization(opts){const{attractors,rootPos,maxDist,minDist,stepLen,maxIter,seed}=opts;let rng=seed||42;function rand(){rng=(rng*1664525+1013904223)>>>0;return rng/4294967296;}const nodes=[{x:rootPos[0],y:rootPos[1],parent:null,children:[]}];let acts=[...attractors];for(let it=0;it<maxIter&&acts.length>0;it++){const near=new Map();for(const a of acts){let bd=Infinity,bn=null;for(let i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){const dx=nodes[i].x-a[0],dy=nodes[i].y-a[1],d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);if(d<bd){bd=d;bn=i;}}if(bd<minDist){continue;}if(bd<maxDist&&bn!==null){const k=bn;near.set(k,(near.get(k)||{dirs:[],node:nodes[k]}));near.get(k).dirs.push([a[0]-nodes[k].x,a[1]-nodes[k].y]);}}acts=acts.filter(a=>{let bd=Infinity;for(const n of nodes){bd=Math.min(bd,Math.hypot(n.x-a[0],n.y-a[1]));}return bd>=minDist;});for(const[ni,info]of near){const{dirs}=info;let sx=0,sy=0;for(const d of dirs){const l=Math.hypot(d[0],d[1]);sx+=d[0]/l;sy+=d[1]/l;}const l=Math.hypot(sx,sy);if(l<0.001)continue;sx/=l;sy/=l;const pid=parseInt(ni);const child={x:nodes[pid].x+sx*stepLen,y:nodes[pid].y+sy*stepLen,parent:pid,children:[]};nodes[pid].children.push(nodes.length);nodes.push(child);}}return nodes;}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette.bg;const fg=window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor;background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const W=600,H=360;const inputX=60,midX=300,outX=540;const pal=[[80,160,240],[240,140,60],[80,200,120]];const scores=['Relevance','Diversity','Freshness'];const outYs=[100,180,260];const fgA=[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]];function lerpC(a,b,t){return[a[0]+( b[0]-a[0])*t,a[1]+(b[1]-a[1])*t,a[2]+(b[2]-a[2])*t];}stroke(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],28);strokeWeight(0.7);noFill();const featureY=Array.from({length:50},(_,i)=>20+i*(320/49));const stageX=Array.from({length:20},(_,i)=>inputX+40+(i*(midX-inputX-80)/19));const stageY=Array.from({length:20},(_,i)=>60+i*(240/19));for(let i=0;i<50;i+=1){const fy=featureY[i];const si=Math.floor(i*20/50);const sx=stageX[si];const sy=stageY[si];line(inputX+8,fy,sx,sy);}stroke(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],22);strokeWeight(0.6);for(let s=0;s<20;s++){const sx=stageX[s],sy=stageY[s];for(let o=0;o<3;o++){const ox=outX-8,oy=outYs[o];const c=lerpC(fgA,pal[o],0.5);stroke(c[0],c[1],c[2],40);line(sx,sy,ox,oy);}}noStroke();for(let i=0;i<50;i++){const fy=featureY[i];const alpha=180;fill(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],alpha);ellipse(inputX,fy,5,5);}for(let s=0;s<20;s++){const sx=stageX[s],sy=stageY[s];fill(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],200);ellipse(sx,sy,7,7);}for(let o=0;o<3;o++){const ox=outX,oy=outYs[o];const c=pal[o];fill(c[0],c[1],c[2],230);ellipse(ox,oy,18,18);}fill(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2]);textFont('Inter');textSize(11);textAlign(RIGHT,CENTER);for(let i=0;i<50;i+=10){text('F'+(i+1),inputX-6,featureY[i]);}textSize(10);textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);fill(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],160);for(let s=0;s<20;s+=1){if(s%3===0)text('T'+(s+1),stageX[s],stageY[s]-10);}for(let o=0;o<3;o++){const c=pal[o];fill(c[0],c[1],c[2]);textSize(13);textAlign(LEFT,CENTER);drawingContext.font='600 13px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+c[0]+','+c[1]+','+c[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.fillText(scores[o],outX+14,outYs[o]);}fill(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],120);textSize(10);textFont('Inter');textAlign(LEFT,TOP);text('50 features',2,2);text('20 stages',midX-28,2);text('3 scores',outX-10,2);fill(fgA[0],fgA[1],fgA[2],200);drawingContext.font='500 11px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fgA[0]+','+fgA[1]+','+fgA[2]+',0.7)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillText('RECOMMENDATION ENGINE',W/2,H-12);}

source.prompt: The recommendation engine has 50 input features, branching through 20 transformation stages to 3 final scores: Relevance, Diversity, Freshness.

args.code: function spaceColonization(opts){const{width:W,height:H,sourceCount:SC,nodeCount:NC,stepLen:SL,killDist:KD,influenceDist:ID,seed:SEED}=opts;let rng=(s=SEED)=>{s=Math.sin(s)*43758.5453|0;return(s=Math.sin(s)*43758.5453)-(s|0);};const sources=[];for(let i=0;i<SC;i++)sources.push([W*0.5+rng()*W*0.18,H*0.12+rng()*H*0.1]);const nodes=[{x:W*0.5,y:H*0.82,vx:0,vy:-1,parent:null}];for(let iter=0;iter<NC*8&&nodes.length<NC;iter++){const active=nodes.filter(n=>{let found=false;for(const s of sources){const dx=s[0]-n.x,dy=s[1]-n.y;if(Math.hypot(dx,dy)<ID)found=true;}return found;});if(active.length===0)break;for(const n of active){let avgX=0,avgY=0,cnt=0;for(const s of sources){const dx=s[0]-n.x,dy=s[1]-n.y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);if(d<ID&&d>0.1){avgX+=dx/d;avgY+=dy/d;cnt++;}}if(cnt>0){const mx=avgX/cnt,my=avgY/cnt,ml=Math.hypot(mx,my)||1;const nx=n.x+(mx/ml)*SL,ny=n.y+(my/ml)*SL;let tooClose=false;for(const ex of nodes){if(Math.hypot(ex.x-nx,ex.y-ny)<SL*0.6){tooClose=true;break;}}if(!tooClose)nodes.push({x:nx,y:ny,vx:mx/ml,vy:my/ml,parent:n});}}sources.splice(0,sources.length,...sources.filter(s=>{for(const n of nodes)if(Math.hypot(n.x-s[0],n.y-s[1])<KD)return false;return true;}));}return nodes;}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette.bg;const fg=window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor;background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const W=600,H=360;const palette=['#3B82F6','#8B5CF6','#EC4899','#F59E0B','#10B981'];function hexToRgb(h){const r=parseInt(h.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(h.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(h.slice(5,7),16);return[r,g,b];}const inputCount=50;const stageCount=20;const scores=[{label:'RELEVANCE',color:'#3B82F6'},{label:'DIVERSITY',color:'#8B5CF6'},{label:'FRESHNESS',color:'#10B981'}];const leftX=52,rightX=W-60,midX=W/2;const inputY=H*0.5,stageY=H*0.5,scoreY=H*0.5;const inputSpacingY=Math.min(6,(H-60)/(inputCount));const stageSpacingY=Math.min(13,(H-80)/(stageCount));const scoreSpacingY=80;const inputStartY=H/2-(inputCount-1)*inputSpacingY/2;const stageStartY=H/2-(stageCount-1)*stageSpacingY/2;const scoreStartY=H/2-(scores.length-1)*scoreSpacingY/2;const col1X=leftX,col2X=leftX+110,col3X=W-110,col4X=W-52;noStroke();for(let i=0;i<inputCount;i++){const y=inputStartY+i*inputSpacingY;fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],160);ellipse(col1X,y,5,5);}noStroke();for(let i=0;i<stageCount;i++){const y=stageStartY+i*stageSpacingY;fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],80);const sy=stageStartY+i*stageSpacingY;for(let j=0;j<inputCount;j++){const iy=inputStartY+j*inputSpacingY;stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],10);strokeWeight(0.4);line(col1X,iy,col2X,sy);}noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],200);rect(col2X-14,sy-5,28,10,3);}for(let i=0;i<scores.length;i++){const sy=stageStartY+i*stageSpacingY;const oy=scoreStartY+i*scoreSpacingY;for(let j=0;j<stageCount;j++){const sc=hexToRgb(scores[i].color);stroke(sc[0],sc[1],sc[2],30);strokeWeight(0.5);line(col2X+14,stageStartY+j*stageSpacingY,col3X-14,oy);}const sc=hexToRgb(scores[i].color);noStroke();fill(sc[0],sc[1],sc[2],230);ellipse(col3X,oy,20,20);fill(sc[0],sc[1],sc[2],255);textFont('IBM Plex Mono');textSize(11);textAlign(LEFT,CENTER);text(scores[i].label,col3X+14,oy);}stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],60);strokeWeight(0.3);for(let i=0;i<inputCount;i++){const iy=inputStartY+i*inputSpacingY;line(col1X+3,iy,col2X-14,stageStartY+Math.floor(i/inputCount*stageCount)*stageSpacingY);}textFont('Inter');noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],120);textSize(10);textAlign(CENTER,BOTTOM);text('50 INPUT FEATURES',col1X+50,inputStartY-8);text('20 TRANSFORM STAGES',col2X+50,stageStartY-8);drawingContext.font='600 10px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',0.7)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillText('OUTPUT SCORES',col3X+30,scoreStartY-12);}

source.prompt: The recommendation engine has 50 input features, branching through 20 transformation stages to 3 final scores: Relevance, Diversity, Freshness.

args.code: function spaceColonization(opts){const{width:W,height:H,seed:SD=42,numSources:nS=50,numAttrActors:nA=20,iterations:IT=120,segLen:sL=8,killDist:kD=12,attractDist:aD=60,branchR:bR=0.35}=opts;let rng=(s)=>{let x=s;return()=>{x=Math.sin(x)*43758.5453123;return x-Math.floor(x);};};let rand=rng(SD);const sources=[];for(let i=0;i<nS;i++)sources.push([rand()*W*0.22+12,rand()*H+4]);const actors=[];for(let i=0;i<nA;i++)actors.push([W*0.28+rand()*W*0.38,rand()*H*0.85+H*0.075]);const roots=[[W*0.28,H*0.5]];const nodes=[{x:W*0.28,y:H*0.5,px:W*0.28,py:H*0.5,d:0}];const alive=actors.map(()=>true);for(let it=0;it<IT;it++){const dirs=nodes.map(()=>({sx:0,sy:0,n:0}));for(let ai=0;ai<actors.length;ai++){if(!alive[ai])continue;let mn=Infinity,mi=-1;for(let ni=0;ni<nodes.length;ni++){const dx=actors[ai][0]-nodes[ni].x,dy=actors[ai][1]-nodes[ni].y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);if(d<mn){mn=d;mi=ni;}}if(mn<kD){alive[ai]=false;continue;}if(mn<aD&&mi>=0){const dx=actors[ai][0]-nodes[mi].x,dy=actors[ai][1]-nodes[mi].y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);dirs[mi].sx+=dx/d;dirs[mi].sy+=dy/d;dirs[mi].n++;}}const newNodes=[];for(let ni=0;ni<nodes.length;ni++){if(dirs[ni].n===0)continue;const dx=dirs[ni].sx/dirs[ni].n,dy=dirs[ni].sy/dirs[ni].n,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1;if(rand()<bR){const px=nodes[ni].x+dx/d*sL,py=nodes[ni].y+dy/d*sL;newNodes.push({x:px,y:py,px:nodes[ni].x,py:nodes[ni].y,d:nodes[ni].d+1});}else{nodes[ni].x+=dx/d*sL;nodes[ni].y+=dy/d*sL;nodes[ni].px=nodes[ni].x-dx/d*sL;nodes[ni].py=nodes[ni].y-dy/d*sL;}}nodes.push(...newNodes);}return{nodes,sources,actors:actors.map((a,i)=>({pos:a,alive:!alive[i]}));};}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const result=spaceColonization({width:600,height:360,seed:77,numSources:50,numAttrActors:22,iterations:140,segLen:7,killDist:10,attractDist:55,branchR:0.32});const nodes=result.nodes;stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],120);strokeWeight(1.2);for(let i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){const n=nodes[i];if(Math.abs(n.x-n.px)>0.1||Math.abs(n.y-n.py)>0.1)line(n.px,n.py,n.x,n.y);}noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],180);for(let i=0;i<result.sources.length;i++){const s=result.sources[i];ellipse(s[0],s[1],4,4);}const outputY=[80,180,280];const outputLabels=['Relevance','Diversity','Freshness'];const outputColors=['#3B82F6','#10B981','#F59E0B'];for(let i=0;i<3;i++){fill(outputColors[i]);noStroke();ellipse(555,outputY[i],22,22);drawAtlasIcon(i===0?'star':i===1?'globe':'lightning',555,outputY[i],18,outputColors[i]);textFont('Inter');textSize(13);textAlign(RIGHT,CENTER);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);noStroke();text(outputLabels[i],534,outputY[i]);}textFont('IBM Plex Mono');textSize(11);textAlign(LEFT,CENTER);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],160);noStroke();text('50 features',4,12);textFont('Inter');textSize(10);textAlign(LEFT,CENTER);text('20 stages',238,12);textSize(18);textAlign(CENTER,BOTTOM);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);text('Recommendation Engine Pipeline',300,355);}

source.prompt: The recommendation engine has 50 input features, branching through 20 transformation stages to 3 final scores: Relevance, Diversity, Freshness.

args.code: function springBrushStroke(wp,opts){if(wp.length<2)return wp.map(([x,y])=>({x,y,thickness:opts.brushSize||4}));const k=opts.springK||0.4,fr=opts.friction||0.55,st=opts.stepSize||2,bs=opts.brushSize||4,sf=opts.speedToThicknessFactor||0.6,mt=opts.minThickness||1;const sg=[];let tl=0;for(let i=1;i<wp.length;i++){const[x0,y0]=wp[i-1],[x1,y1]=wp[i],dx=x1-x0,dy=y1-y0,sl=Math.hypot(dx,dy);sg.push({x0,y0,dx,dy,sl,t0:tl});tl+=sl;}if(tl===0)return[{x:wp[0][0],y:wp[0][1],thickness:bs}];let bx=wp[0][0],by=wp[0][1],vx=0,vy=0;const out=[];for(let d=0;d<=tl;d+=st){let s=sg[0];for(let i=0;i<sg.length;i++)if(d>=sg[i].t0&&d<=sg[i].t0+sg[i].sl){s=sg[i];break;}const lt=s.sl>0?(d-s.t0)/s.sl:0,cx=s.x0+s.dx*lt,cy=s.y0+s.dy*lt;vx+=(cx-bx)*k;vy+=(cy-by)*k;vx*=fr;vy*=fr;bx+=vx;by+=vy;const sp=Math.hypot(vx,vy);out.push({x:bx,y:by,thickness:Math.max(mt,bs-sp*sf)});}return out;}function drawAtlasIcon(name,x,y,size,color){const s=size/24;drawingContext.save();drawingContext.translate(x-size/2,y-size/2);drawingContext.scale(s,s);if(typeof color==='string')drawingContext.strokeStyle=color;else drawingContext.strokeStyle=`rgb(${color[0]},${color[1]},${color[2]})`;drawingContext.lineWidth=1.5/s;drawingContext.lineCap='round';drawingContext.lineJoin='round';drawingContext.fillStyle='none';const paths={'database':[[['M','4','6'],['Q','4','4','12','4'],['Q','20','4','20','6'],['L','20','10'],['Q','20','12','12','12'],['Q','4','12','4','10'],['Z']],[['M','4','10'],['L','4','14'],['Q','4','16','12','16'],['Q','20','16','20','14'],['L','20','10']],[['M','4','14'],['L','4','18'],['Q','4','20','12','20'],['Q','20','20','20','18'],['L','20','14']]],'lightning':[[['M','13','2'],['L','4.5','13'],['L','11','13'],['L','11','22'],['L','19.5','11'],['L','13','11'],['Z']]],'chart-bar':[[['M','3','3'],['L','3','21'],['L','21','21']],[['M','7','14'],['L','7','19'],['L','10','19'],['L','10','14'],['Z']],[['M','12','9'],['L','12','19'],['L','15','19'],['L','15','9'],['Z']],[['M','17','5'],['L','17','19'],['L','20','19'],['L','20','5'],['Z']]],'star':[[['M','12','2'],['L','15.09','8.26'],['L','22','9.27'],['L','17','14.14'],['L','18.18','21.02'],['L','12','17.77'],['L','5.82','21.02'],['L','7','14.14'],['L','2','9.27'],['L','8.91','8.26'],['Z']]],'arrow-right':[[['M','5','12'],['L','19','12']],[['M','12','5'],['L','19','12'],['L','12','19']]],'check':[[['M','20','6'],['L','9','17'],['L','4','12']]],'refresh':[[['M','23','4'],['L','23','10'],['L','17','10']],[['M','1','20'],['L','1','14'],['L','7','14']],[['M','3.51','9'],['A','9','9','0','0','1','21','6.06']],[['M','20.49','15'],['A','9','9','0','0','1','3','17.94']]]};const ps=paths[name]||paths['star'];for(const seg of ps){const p=new Path2D();let first=true;for(const cmd of seg){if(cmd[0]==='M'){if(!first)p.closePath();p.moveTo(parseFloat(cmd[1]),parseFloat(cmd[2]));first=false;}else if(cmd[0]==='L'){p.lineTo(parseFloat(cmd[1]),parseFloat(cmd[2]));}else if(cmd[0]==='Q'){p.quadraticCurveTo(parseFloat(cmd[1]),parseFloat(cmd[2]),parseFloat(cmd[3]),parseFloat(cmd[4]));}else if(cmd[0]==='Z'){p.closePath();}}drawingContext.stroke(p);}drawingContext.restore();}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();textFont('Inter');}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const fgc=`rgb(${fg[0]},${fg[1]},${fg[2]})`;const fga=(a)=>`rgba(${fg[0]},${fg[1]},${fg[2]},${a})`;const W=600,H=360;const colX=[72,220,380,528];const labelY=20;const rowTop=50;const rowBot=310;const midY=180;fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);noStroke();drawingContext.font=`600 11px Inter`;drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle=fgc;drawingContext.fillText('INPUT',colX[0],labelY);drawingContext.fillText('TRANSFORM',colX[1]+80,labelY);drawingContext.fillText('OUTPUT',colX[3],labelY);const featureCount=50;const featureSpacing=(rowBot-rowTop)/(featureCount-1);const features=[];for(let i=0;i<featureCount;i++){const fy=rowTop+i*featureSpacing;features.push([colX[0],fy]);}noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],40);strokeWeight(0.4);for(const[fx,fy]of features){line(fx,fy,fx+8,fy);}const stageCount=20;const stageSpacing=(rowBot-rowTop)/(stageCount-1);const stages=[];for(let i=0;i<stageCount;i++){const sy=rowTop+i*stageSpacing;stages.push([colX[1],sy]);}const scores=[{y:100,label:'Relevance',icon:'star',col:[255,160,60]},{y:midY,label:'Diversity',icon:'chart-bar',col:[80,160,220]},{y:260,label:'Freshness',icon:'refresh',col:[100,200,130]}];for(const[fx,fy]of features){const si=Math.floor(Math.random()*(stageCount));const[sx,sy]=stages[si];const wp=[[fx,fy],[fx+40,fy],[sx-20,sy],[sx,sy]];const stk=springBrushStroke(wp,{brushSize:1.5,springK:0.35,friction:0.6,stepSize:1.5,speedToThicknessFactor:0.4,minThickness:0.4});noFill();for(let j=1;j<stk.length;j++){stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],22);strokeWeight(stk[j].thickness);line(stk[j-1].x,stk[j-1].y,stk[j].x,stk[j].y);}}for(const[sx,sy]of stages){const scI=Math.floor(Math.random()*scores.length);const sc=scores[scI];const mid1x=sx+60,mid1y=sy,mid2x=sc.y===sy?sc.y:colX[2]-20,mid2y=sc.y;const wp=[[sx,sy],[mid1x,mid1y],[colX[2]-15,sc.y],[colX[2],sc.y]];const stk=springBrushStroke(wp,{brushSize:1.8,springK:0.3,friction:0.58,stepSize:1.5,speedToThicknessFactor:0.5,minThickness:0.5});noFill();for(let j=1;j<stk.length;j++){stroke(sc.col[0],sc.col[1],sc.col[2],30);strokeWeight(stk[j].thickness);line(stk[j-1].x,stk[j-1].y,stk[j].x,stk[j].y);}}stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],55);strokeWeight(0.5);for(const[sx,sy]of stages){ellipse(sx,sy,5,5);}noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],120);drawingContext.font=`500 8px IBM Plex Mono`;for(let i=0;i<stageCount;i++){const[sx,sy]=stages[i];drawingContext.textAlign='right';drawingContext.fillStyle=fga(0.55);drawingContext.fillText(`T${i+1}`,sx-6,sy+3);}for(const sc of scores){fill(sc.col[0],sc.col[1],sc.col[2],200);noStroke();ellipse(colX[3]-8,sc.y,38,38);drawAtlasIcon(sc.icon,colX[3]-8,sc.y,20,`rgb(${bg[0]},${bg[1]},${bg[2]})`);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);drawingContext.font=`600 13px Inter`;drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.fillStyle=fgc;drawingContext.fillText(sc.label,colX[3]+12,sc.y-5);drawingContext.font=`400 10px IBM Plex Mono`;drawingContext.fillStyle=fga(0.65);drawingContext.fillText('score',colX[3]+12,sc.y+8);}stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],30);strokeWeight(1);noFill();rect(colX[0]-14,rowTop-8,28,rowBot-rowTop+16,4);drawingContext.font=`700 22px IBM Plex Mono`;drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle=fgc;drawingContext.fillText('50',colX[0],rowTop-16);drawingContext.font=`500 9px Inter`;drawingContext.fillStyle=fga(0.6);drawingContext.fillText('features',colX[0],rowBot+20);rect(colX[1]-14,rowTop-8,28,rowBot-rowTop+16,4);drawingContext.font=`700 22px IBM Plex Mono`;drawingContext.fillStyle=fgc;drawingContext.fillText('20',colX[1],rowTop-16);drawingContext.font=`500 9px Inter`;drawingContext.fillStyle=fga(0.6);drawingContext.fillText('stages',colX[1],rowBot+20);}

args.code: function springBrushStroke(wp,opts){if(wp.length<2)return wp.map(([x,y])=>({x,y,thickness:opts.brushSize||4}));const k=opts.springK||0.4,fr=opts.friction||0.55,st=opts.stepSize||2,bs=opts.brushSize||4,sf=opts.speedToThicknessFactor||0.6,mt=opts.minThickness||0.5;const sg=[];let tl=0;for(let i=1;i<wp.length;i++){const[x0,y0]=wp[i-1],[x1,y1]=wp[i],dx=x1-x0,dy=y1-y0,sl=Math.hypot(dx,dy);sg.push({x0,y0,dx,dy,sl,t0:tl});tl+=sl;}if(tl===0)return[{x:wp[0][0],y:wp[0][1],thickness:bs}];let bx=wp[0][0],by=wp[0][1],vx=0,vy=0;const out=[];for(let d=0;d<=tl;d+=st){let s=sg[0];for(let i=0;i<sg.length;i++)if(d>=sg[i].t0&&d<=sg[i].t0+sg[i].sl){s=sg[i];break;}const lt=s.sl>0?(d-s.t0)/s.sl:0,cx=s.x0+s.dx*lt,cy=s.y0+s.dy*lt;vx+=(cx-bx)*k;vy+=(cy-by)*k;vx*=fr;vy*=fr;bx+=vx;by+=vy;const sp=Math.hypot(vx,vy);out.push({x:bx,y:by,thickness:Math.max(mt,bs-sp*sf)});}return out;}function drawArrow(x1,y1,x2,y2,col,w){stroke(col[0],col[1],col[2]);strokeWeight(w||1.5);line(x1,y1,x2,y2);const ang=Math.atan2(y2-y1,x2-x1);const sz=7;noStroke();fill(col[0],col[1],col[2]);triangle(x2,y2,x2-sz*Math.cos(ang-0.4),y2-sz*Math.sin(ang-0.4),x2-sz*Math.cos(ang+0.4),y2-sz*Math.sin(ang+0.4));}function drawRoundRect(x,y,w,h,r,fillCol,strokeCol,sw){if(fillCol){noStroke();fill(fillCol[0],fillCol[1],fillCol[2],fillCol[3]||255);}else noFill();if(strokeCol){stroke(strokeCol[0],strokeCol[1],strokeCol[2]);strokeWeight(sw||1.5);}else noStroke();rect(x,y,w,h,r);}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette.bg;const fg=window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor;background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const fgA=[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]];const fgD=[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],40];const fgM=[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],120];const fgL=[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],80];const W=600,H=360;const colX=[72,210,348,510];const scoreX=[490,510,530];const scoreY=[100,180,260];const scoreW=90,scoreH=42;const stageW=88,stageH=30;const inputX=colX[0],inputY=H/2;const inputR=28;noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(1.5);ellipse(inputX,inputY,inputR*2,inputR*2);textFont('Inter');textSize(10);textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);noStroke();text('50',inputX,inputY-5);textSize(8);text('features',inputX,inputY+6);const stageRows=5;const stageCols=4;const stageGapY=(H-60)/stageRows;const stageStartY=45;const stageAreaX=[140,220,300,380];const stageColors=[[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],30],[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],50],[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],70],[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],55]];const stages=[];for(let c=0;c<stageCols;c++){for(let r=0;r<stageRows;r++){const sx=stageAreaX[c]-stageW/2;const sy=stageStartY+r*stageGapY;stages.push({x:sx,y:sy,cx:stageAreaX[c],cy:sy+stageH/2,col:c,row:r});}}stages.forEach((s,i)=>{drawRoundRect(s.x,s.y,stageW,stageH,5,[bg[0],bg[1],bg[2],255],fgA,1);noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],25);rect(s.x,s.y,stageW,stageH,5);stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(1);noFill();rect(s.x,s.y,stageW,stageH,5);});textFont('IBM Plex Mono');textSize(9);textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);noStroke();stages.forEach((s,i)=>{text('T'+(i+1),s.cx,s.cy);});noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],60);ellipse(inputX,inputY,inputR*2+16,inputR*2+16);for(let r=0;r<stageRows;r++){const tgt=stages[r];drawArrow(inputX+inputR+4,inputY,tgt.cx-stageW/2-4,tgt.cy,fgA,1);}for(let c=0;c<stageCols-1;c++){for(let r=0;r<stageRows;r++){const src=stages[c*stageRows+r];for(let dr=-1;dr<=1;dr++){const nr=r+dr;if(nr<0||nr>=stageRows)continue;const dst=stages[(c+1)*stageRows+nr];stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(dr===0?1.2:0.6);const alpha=dr===0?120:40;stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);const ctx2=drawingContext;ctx2.globalAlpha=dr===0?0.5:0.2;line(src.cx+stageW/2,src.cy,dst.cx-stageW/2,dst.cy);ctx2.globalAlpha=1.0;}}}const alpha=dist===0?0.8:dist===1?0.4:0.12;drawingContext.globalAlpha=alpha;stroke(scoreColors[si][0],scoreColors[si][1],scoreColors[si][2]);strokeWeight(dist===0?1.5:0.8);noFill();line(src.cx+stageW/2,src.cy,sxl-4,sy);drawingContext.globalAlpha=1.0;}});textFont('Inter');textSize(12);textAlign(LEFT,TOP);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);noStroke();text('Input',18,H/2-34);textSize(9);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],160);text('50 source.prompt: The recommendation engine has 50 input features, branching through 20 transformation stages to 3 final scores: Relevance, Diversity, Freshness.

args.code: function spaceColonization(opts){const{width:W,height:H,sourceCount:sc,attractorCount:ac,seed:sd,stepLen:sl,killDist:kd,influenceDist:id_,maxIter:mi}=Object.assign({width:600,height:360,sourceCount:3,attractorCount:80,seed:42,stepLen:8,killDist:12,influenceDist:60,maxIter:200},opts);function rng(s){let x=s^0x9e3779b9;return function(){x=((x>>>16)^x)*0x45d9f3b;x=((x>>>16)^x)*0x45d9f3b;x=(x>>>16)^x;return(x>>>0)/4294967296;};}const rand=rng(sd);const sources=[];for(let i=0;i<sc;i++){sources.push({x:W*0.88,y:H*(0.2+0.3*i),edges:[]});}const attractors=[];for(let i=0;i<ac;i++){attractors.push({x:W*0.15+rand()*W*0.6,y:H*0.05+rand()*H*0.9,active:true});}const nodes=[{x:W*0.08,y:H*0.5,parent:-1,edges:[]}];for(let iter=0;iter<mi;iter++){const dirs=new Map();for(const a of attractors){if(!a.active)continue;let best=null,bd=Infinity;for(let ni=0;ni<nodes.length;ni++){const dx=a.x-nodes[ni].x,dy=a.y-nodes[ni].y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);if(d<bd){bd=d;best=ni;}}if(best!==null&&bd<id_){const e=dirs.get(best)||{x:0,y:0,c:0};const dx=a.x-nodes[best].x,dy=a.y-nodes[best].y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);e.x+=dx/d;e.y+=dy/d;e.c++;dirs.set(best,e);}}if(dirs.size===0)break;for(const[ni,d]of dirs){const len=Math.hypot(d.x,d.y);const nx=nodes[ni].x+(d.x/len)*sl,ny=nodes[ni].y+(d.y/len)*sl;nodes.push({x:nx,y:ny,parent:ni});}for(const a of attractors){if(!a.active)continue;for(const n of nodes){if(Math.hypot(a.x-n.x,a.y-n.y)<kd){a.active=false;break;}}}}return{nodes,sources};}function getChromotomePalette(name){const palettes={'jung':['#4e3b27','#7e6c54','#c8b47e','#e2d5b7','#a2713b'],'ranganath':['#f04e23','#f6a92c','#009f8c','#603f99','#f9f0dc'],'kovecses':['#e63946','#457b9d','#1d3557','#a8dadc','#f1faee'],'hilda':['#e07a5f','#3d405b','#81b29a','#f2cc8f','#f4f1de']};return palettes[name]||palettes['hilda'];}function hexToRgb(h){const r=parseInt(h.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(h.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(h.slice(5,7),16);return[r,g,b];}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const pal=getChromotomePalette('hilda').map(hexToRgb);const scoreColors=[pal[0],pal[2],pal[3]];const scoreLabels=['Relevance','Diversity','Freshness'];const scoreY=[H*0.22,H*0.5,H*0.78];const inputY=H*0.5;const inputX=52;const midX=300;const scoreX=530;const stageCount=20;const featureCount=50;noStroke();textFont('Inter');textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],220);textSize(10);drawingContext.font='600 10px Inter';for(let i=0;i<featureCount;i++){const fy=H*0.04+i*(H*0.92/featureCount);const cr=2.2;fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],180);ellipse(18,fy,cr*2,cr*2);}stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],30);strokeWeight(0.5);for(let i=0;i<featureCount;i++){const fy=H*0.04+i*(H*0.92/featureCount);const jx=38+Math.sin(i*1.7)*6;line(18,fy,jx,inputY);}noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],200);ellipse(inputX,inputY,14,14);drawingContext.font='700 11px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+bg[0]+','+bg[1]+','+bg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText('50',inputX,inputY+1);stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],40);strokeWeight(0.8);const rowH=H*0.88/stageCount;for(let s=0;s<stageCount;s++){const sy=H*0.06+s*rowH;const sw=18,sh=rowH*0.72;noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],s%4===0?90:50);rect(midX-sw/2,sy,sw,sh,2);}stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],55);strokeWeight(1.2);for(let s=0;s<stageCount;s++){const sy=H*0.06+s*rowH+rowH*0.36;if(s<stageCount-1)line(midX,sy,midX,sy+rowH*0.28+1);}stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],60);strokeWeight(1.0);line(inputX+7,inputY,midX-9,inputY);const arrowMid=midX-9;noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],160);triangle(arrowMid,inputY-3,arrowMid,inputY+3,arrowMid+5,inputY);noStroke();drawingContext.font='600 9px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillText('20 stages',midX,H*0.02+4);for(let j=0;j<3;j++){const sc2=scoreColors[j];const sy2=scoreY[j];const lastStageY=H*0.06+(stageCount-1)*rowH+rowH*0.36;stroke(sc2[0],sc2[1],sc2[2],200);strokeWeight(1.5);line(midX+9,lastStageY+(j-1)*4,scoreX-20,sy2);noStroke();fill(sc2[0],sc2[1],sc2[2],220);ellipse(scoreX,sy2,22,22);drawingContext.font='700 10px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+bg[0]+','+bg[1]+','+bg[2]+')';const abbr=['R','D','F'][j];drawingContext.fillText(abbr,scoreX,sy2+1);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],200);textAlign(LEFT,CENTER);textSize(12);drawingContext.font='600 12px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.fillText(scoreLabels[j],scoreX+14,sy2+1);}fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],100);noStroke();textAlign(LEFT,TOP);drawingContext.font='500 9px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.fillText('Features',2,4);stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],80);strokeWeight(0.8);line(inputX+5,H*0.04-2,inputX+5,H*0.96+2);line(inputX+5,H*0.04-2,inputX+1,H*0.04+2);line(inputX+5,H*0.96+2,inputX+1,H*0.96-2);}
